name: Chinese Tacos
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Pork, chicken or beef, minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Mince and soak the dried oriental mushrooms.
2. Combine the pork, celery, onion, soaked mushrooms, white pepper, light soy sauce, and curry powder in a bowl. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. Place about 1 teaspoon of filling just off center of each won ton wrapper.
4. Fold the wrapper over the filling to form a rectangle.
5. Pleat the open edges of the wrapper and press to seal securely.
6. Heat oil in a deep skillet or pot to 375°F (190°C).
7. Carefully lower the sealed wrappers into the hot oil.
8. Fry until golden brown, turning occasionally to ensure even cooking.
9. Remove the tacos from the oil using a slotted spoon and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
